allow: PowerShell($src = "e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\story-os-tmp"; $dst = "e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\Story OS"; Get-ChildItem $src -Exclude "node_modules", ".git" | ForEach-Object { $target = Join-Path $dst $_.Name; if \(-not \(Test-Path $target\)\) { Copy-Item $_.FullName $target -Recurse -Force } else { Write-Output "Skipping existing: $\($_.Name\)" } }; Write-Output "Done copying")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\Story OS\\src" -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\Story OS\\", ""\) })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\Story OS\\src" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\Story OS\\", ""\) })
PowerShell($base = "e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\Story OS"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$base\\src\\lib\\ai"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$base\\src\\app\\api\\ai\\continue")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Output "Killed pid $p" }; Start-Sleep 1; cd "e:\\Backup_WK\\资料\\Story OS"; npm run dev)
PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/storyos"; npx vitest run 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "\(Tests|passed|failed\)" | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\pg17-extracted"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:TEMP\\pg17-extracted"; Write-Output "Cleaned temp extract" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\pg17.zip"\) { Remove-Item -Force "$env:TEMP\\pg17.zip"; Write-Output "Cleaned temp zip" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\postgresql-17-installer.exe"\) { Remove-Item -Force "$env:TEMP\\postgresql-17-installer.exe"; Write-Output "Cleaned temp installer" }; Write-Output "Cleanup done")

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/storyos"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; if \($?\) { npx vitest run 2>&1 | Select-String "Tests|passed|failed" | Select-Object -Last 3 })

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD="password"; $psql="E:\\Large-scale softwares\\PostgreSQL\\17\\pgsql\\bin\\psql.exe"; Get-Content scripts/seed-template.sql -Raw | & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d storyos 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD="password"; $psql="E:\\Large-scale softwares\\PostgreSQL\\17\\pgsql\\bin\\psql.exe"; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d storyos -c "DELETE FROM stories WHERE title LIKE '%校园%'; SELECT title FROM stories;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD="password"; $psql="E:\\Large-scale softwares\\PostgreSQL\\17\\pgsql\\bin\\psql.exe"; & $psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d storyos -c "SELECT id, title FROM stories;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(git commit -m "init: Story OS MVP �� AI-powered long-form story writing platform" 2>&1)
